description: 5V 1A positive linear voltage regulator — fixed output, requires input ≥7V

absolute_max.power_dissipation: See thermal derating — (Vin-Vout) × Iout must not exceed device rating

pins.name: INPUT
pins.description: Unregulated DC input voltage. Must be at least 2V above output (7V minimum for 5V output).
pins.requirements: 0.33µF ceramic cap to GND required if regulator is more than 7cm from filter capacitor. Keep input wiring short.

pins.name: GND
pins.description: Ground reference for input and output. In TO-220, this is the center pin.
pins.requirements: Connect to common ground. In TO-220, the metal tab is also GND — if mounted to a heatsink, the heatsink is at GND potential.

pins.name: OUTPUT
pins.requirements: 0.1µF ceramic cap to GND for stability. Can add larger electrolytic (10µF+) for transient response.

required_passives.placement: INPUT to GND, close to regulator
required_passives.reason: Required if regulator is far from bulk filter capacitor — prevents oscillation. Datasheet p.1

required_passives.placement: OUTPUT to GND, close to regulator
required_passives.reason: Improves transient response and stability — datasheet p.1

application_circuits.name: Fixed 5V regulator
application_circuits.description: INPUT: 7V–35V DC with 0.33µF cap. OUTPUT: 5V with 0.1µF cap. GND to common ground.

common_mistakes: Minimum input-output differential is 2V — input must be at least 7V for 5V output
No heatsink at >500mA output current causes thermal shutdown (Tj = 150°C)
Power dissipation = (Vin - 5V) × Iout — at 12V input, 1A load dissipates 7W — requires heatsink
TO-220 metal tab is GND — if tab touches metal chassis or other conductors at different potential, short circuit occurs
Output voltage tolerance is ±4% — not suitable as a precision reference
LM7805 has no soft-start or enable pin — output rises immediately on power-up
notes: Dropout voltage ~2V. Thermal resistance TO-220: Θja ~65°C/W without heatsink. Equivalent parts: 7805, UA7805, L7805. For lower dropout use LM2940 (0.5V dropout) or AMS1117 with adjustable version.
